ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "taxon" TEXT /* Taxonomic category of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "primary_method" TEXT /* Primary method used for data collection */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Full scientific name of the species */,
  "common_names" TEXT /* Multiple common names for the species, separated by commas */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Current conservation status */,
  "iucn_red_list_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IUCN Red List ID */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the species was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the species record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mass_data" (
  "mass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for mass data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "mean_mass_g" REAL /* Mean mass of the species in grams */,
  "log10_mass" REAL /* Logarithm (base 10) of the species' mean mass */,
  "max_mass_g" REAL /* Maximum recorded mass of the species in grams */,
  "min_mass_g" REAL /* Minimum recorded mass of the species in grams */,
  "mass_reference" TEXT /* Reference for mass data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used to calculate mean mass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mass_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_area" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for habitat area entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "mean_hra_m2" REAL /* Mean habitat range area in square meters */,
  "log10_hra" REAL /* Logarithm (base 10) of the habitat range area */,
  "hra_reference" TEXT /* Reference for the habitat range area data */,
  "max_hra_m2" REAL /* Maximum habitat range area in square meters */,
  "min_hra_m2" REAL /* Minimum habitat range area in square meters */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat */,
  "habitat_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habitat_area_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecological_data" (
  "ecological_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for ecological data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "realm" TEXT /* Ecological realm of the species */,
  "thermoregulation" TEXT /* Type of thermoregulation */,
  "locomotion" TEXT /* Type of locomotion */,
  "trophic_guild" TEXT /* Trophic guild of the species */,
  "reproductive_strategy" TEXT /* Reproductive strategy */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "migratory_pattern" TEXT /* Migratory pattern */,
  "predation_risk" TEXT /* Level of predation risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for dimension entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "dimension_type" TEXT /* Type of dimension */,
  "max_length_cm" REAL /* Maximum length of the species in centimeters */,
  "min_length_cm" REAL /* Minimum length of the species in centimeters */,
  "average_length_cm" REAL /* Average length of the species in centimeters */,
  "dimension_reference" TEXT /* Reference for dimensional data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dimensions_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the research method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method */,
  "method_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the method */,
  "method_cost" REAL /* Cost of the method */,
  "method_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for reference */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation of the research or study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal or publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User accessing the data */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Species being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the image */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image */,
  "image_source" TEXT /* Source of the image */,
  "image_license" TEXT /* License under which the image is shared */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the image was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_images_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_conservation" (
  "conservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for conservation status entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "status" TEXT /* Conservation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "red_list_link" TEXT /* Link to the IUCN Red List entry */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Major threats to the species */,
  "conservation_actions" TEXT /* Conservation actions being taken */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the conservation status was last assessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_conservation_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
